headline: Synchrony Financial: Sell-Off Presents Great Entry Point For Shares (Upgrade)
summary: Synchrony Financial is upgraded to Buy due to an attractive entry point after a recent sell-off and strong NII growth. Learn more about SYF stock here.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Synchrony Financial, Lowers Price Target to $80
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $88 to $80.

headline: Synchrony Financial Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Synchrony Financial is poised to release its first-quarter results later this month, and analysts are projecting a double-digit earnings growth.

headline: Synchrony Puts Teachers First This Financial Literacy Month with $2 Million Commitment to Bring Training, Tools, and Financial Literacy Labs to U.S. High Schools
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) announced today it will provide $2 million in grants and in-kind donations to nonprofit partners and schools to help K–12 public school teachers, educators, and community organizations bring personal finance lessons to life, so more students can graduate with real-world financial knowledge and confidence.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Synchrony Financial, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: Barclays  analyst Terry Ma   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $93 to $82.
